close_reason: Positive observation: batch list avoids extra round-trip
description: lib.rs:300-318 returns (Option<NvmId>, Vec<NvmId>) so the caller (put) gets the full id list 'for free' and passes it to find_free_id_from_list (lib.rs:335) without re-issuing nvm_list. This saves one RPC per put on a new object. A reviewer might 'simplify' by returning Option<NvmId> and re-fetching in put() — defend the current shape; the second list is the same data the caller needs and re-fetching costs latency. The TOCTOU note (lib.rs:329-334) is also good — explicit acknowledgement that the gap between find_free and nvm_add is inherent to the wolfHSM protocol, not a bug to paper over.
title: find_by_label returns the full nvm_list so put() can find a free id without a second round-trip
